UI.mainMenuMessage: Bug reports for the Archipelago mod would be appreciated. You can report bugs by using `apreportbug` in the console.
UI.revTrapDesc: The map has been flipped! Trap ends in <time>.
UI.unchipTrapDesc: Your brainchip has been disabled! Re-enables in <time>.
UI.disfigTrapDesc: Your jaw has been removed! Comes back in <time>.
UI.wipeTrapDesc: Your memories have been removed! They will come back in <time>.
UI.hearing: Trap: WHAT!? I CAN'T HEAR YOU ! Hearing loss increased.
UI.rev: made you feel tipsy. World flipped.
UI.elder: sent something big your way. Something really big.
UI.rep: spread gossip. All traders on this layer are now hostile.
UI.fragileWater: made your warranty expire. <item> was destroyed.
UI.pushup: demands you get on the ground and give them twenty!
UI.apItemDesc: A mysterious item from another world. It looks to be <plr>'s <item>.
UI.apItemTrader: A mysterious item from another world. Buy it to see what it is.
UI.intBundleDesc: Archipelago has removed the recipe from this blueprint, but you will still get the INT Experience from it.

Commands.dlDesc: Toggles DeathLink for the current game session.
Commands.dlSeverityDesc: How punishing DeathLink should be. Choices are 'kill' and 'limbdamage'
Commands.dlInvalid: CUAP: Severity of '<sev>' is invalid. Defaulted to 'kill'
Commands.chatDesc: Sends a message to Archipelago chat.
Commands.hintItemDesc: Item to hint for. Leave blank to request hint status.
Commands.hintLocEmpty: No location was given to hint.
Commands.aliasNameDesc: Alias to change your slot name to.
Commands.reportBugDesc: Opens CUAP's Github to report a bug.
Commands.reportBugScreenshotDesc: Whether to capture a screenshot to the CUAP folder.
Commands.resetSpamDesc: Clears CUAP's copies of sent locations. Use this to resend broken checks.
Commands.resetSpamConfirm: CUAP: Data cleared. Run apreportbug if the issue persists.
Commands.questsDesc: Forces the questboard to refresh sent checks. Use this if a quest didn't send properly.
Commands.questsConfirm: CUAP: Quests refreshed. Run apreportbug if the issue persists.
Commands.langDesc: Change the language of the Archipelago mod. Highly recommended to only run this on the main menu.
Commands.langFileDesc: File to load language data from, including extention (ex: EN.json).
Commands.cheatEmpty: No item was given to cheat in.
Commands.cheatItemDesc: Item to request be cheated in.
Commands.setSkillDesc: Force set a skill to a certain level. Only works if Skillsanity is enabled.
Commands.setSkillSkillDesc: Which skill to change the level of.
Commands.setSkillLevelDesc: What level to set the skill to.

Errors.noPort: Connection error: No server port was given.
Errors.invalidPort: Connection error: <port> is not a valid port.
Errors.skillUpdate: Skillsanity Error: UpdateSkillsanityValues was called with an invalid skill
Errors.cmdNotConnected: Archipelago isn't connected or session was closed. You must be connected to run this command.
Errors.dlsNull: DeathLinkService is null! This shouldn't happen, yell at me on Discord or Github if it does!
Errors.skillSending: Skillsanity Error: SkillSending Harmony patch received an invalid skill! This is (technically) a basegame bug!
Errors.moodleNotFound: Moodlesanity Error: Moodle <mood> is not in the Moodlesanity index list!
Errors.moodleCheckMissing: Moodlesanity Error! Could not find assocaited check for moodle
Errors.dlNoSender: Received a DeathLink packet with no sender. Ignoring.
